properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Burn away my virtues May there be just You in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, write me into Your great story, Lord, write me into Your great song, Take all I have, It's for Your glory, One day all else will be gone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Give me grace to follow Only You can lead me home

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, write me into Your great story, Lord, write me into Your great song, Take all I have, It's for Your glory, One day all else will be gone, One day all else will be gone.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your Name be glorified, glorified, Your Name be glorified, glorified, Your Name be glorified, glorified, Your Name be glorified, glorified.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Your Name be glorified, glorified, Your Name be glorified, glorified.
